title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, providing easy integration with local LLMs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, enabling browser and Node.js integration.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, allowing use within LangChain workflows.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat UI, model management, and RAG support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama, enabling JVM applications to interact with local LLMs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust client for Ollama with async support and ergonomic API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing Ollama models as GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple web chat interface for Ollama built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI for Ollama with additional utilities and interactive features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and compose files for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot implementation using Ollama models for server chat interactions.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama enabling AI responses in channels and DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance using Ollama models within notes.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for Ollama integration with code completion and chat features.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit web app for chatting with Ollama models with session management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation implementation using Ollama and ChromaDB.
